title: clematis recta subsp. terniflora
intro: Clematis recta subsp. terniflora, also known as the Three-flowered Clematis, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis recta subsp. terniflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
